items.title: One of Europe's last 'wild rivers' becomes UNESCO reserve | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Albania's Vjosa river was named a UNESCO biosphere reserve, a triumph for conservationists hoping to protect one of Europe's last remaining 'wild rivers’.

#News #Reuters #Newsfeed #albania #environment #unesco

items.title: South Korea can't pay $350 billion in US tariff deal, top aide says | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>South Korea is unable to pay $350 billion upfront as President Trump suggested under a deal to cut tariffs and is seeking an alternative solution, Seoul's presidential adviser said.

items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>The US said it will revoke Gustavo Petro's visa after the Colombian president took to New York's streets in a pro-Palestinian demonstration and urged US soldiers to disobey President Trump's orders.

items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>World leaders gather at the United Nations for the 80th General Assembly.

Leaders gather in New York every September for several days of speeches at the United Nations General Assembly, which began its 80th session on September 23.

items.title: Mexican town mourns father slain by ICE in Chicago | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Family and friends gathered in a small Mexican town to mourn and demand justice for a 38-year-old father of two who was killed by an immigration agent during an arrest attempt in a Chicago suburb. 

#News #Mexico #Americas #USA #Immigration #Reuters #Newsfeed

items.title: Netanyahu at UNGA, Gaza, Comey and Ryder Cup
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu slams Western countries for recognizing Palestinian statehood (https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/netanyahu-outlines-israeli-victories-over-hamas-iran-un-speech-2025-09-26/)  during a UN General Assembly speech. A Reuters analysis contradicts Israel's explanation of a deadly August attack (https://www.reuters.com/investigations/visual-evidence-upends-israels-official-story-deadly-attack-gaza-hospital-2025-09-26/)  on Gaza’s Nasser Hospital. Former FBI Director James Comey’s indictment (https://www.reuters.com/legal/government/comey-indictment-escalates-trumps-campaign-chill-opposition-2025-09-26/)  is the first criminal prosecution of a high-profile political adversary by the Trump administration. Plus, President Trump attends the Ryder Cup. (https://www.reuters.com/sports/golf/extra-security-snarling-traffic-ryder-cup-fans-await-trump-2025-09-26/) 



Listen to On Assignment ⁠here⁠ (https://link.chtbl.com/nS9uZpPg?sid=X) .

items.title: Giant murals bring small Kosovo town to life
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Artists from around the world are taking part in Mural Fest in Kosovo's Ferizaj, transforming the city's pale walls into soulful splashes of color and art.
 
#kosovo #art #ferizaj #mural</article>

items.title: Russia's fuel crisis causes long lines and headaches for motorists | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
